backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Parent Insight Portal nav tab, root component, and sub-sections) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON catalog of short summaries for key frontend component files including AI Teaching Assistant, global CSS tokens, Tailwind config, and several tab sub-section components.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SmartCampus Connect React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines all 9 tab IDs, provides a TabContext, and renders the active tab component between a Navbar and footer with theme support.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar rendering all 9 tabs with icons, active-state styling (including special colors for institute-command and parent-insight-portal tabs), and a theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AcademicRoa: Academic Roadmaps tab component displaying semester-wise subjects with progress, status badges, and teacher contact cards, filterable by branch and semester.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AntiTrapFee: Renders a community-driven scam/fraud reporting feed where students can view, upvote, and comment on reports about companies, with each report card showing verification status, upvote count, and expandable comments.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Competitive: Displays a hub for students preparing for competitive exams (GATE, CAT, GRE, etc.) with filterable peer profiles, study groups, and an option to create a personal exam profile.
frontend/src/components/tabs/faculty-hub: Offers faculty an academic control panel for uploading syllabi, entering student marks, scheduling exams, creating quizzes/tasks, sending notifications, and generating reports.
Provides faculty with an AI assistant panel that generates lecture summaries and quiz questions from input text, and displays at-risk student alerts with performance predictions and trend indicators.

Displays a faculty dashboard for tracking syllabus completion across branches and divisions, including branch-wise progress bars, a topic timeline, pending overdue topics, and a weekly heatmap of subject coverage.
Renders a faculty performance leaderboard with department filtering, showing each faculty member's teaching score, research count, feedback rating, and expandable improvement suggestions.
Manages external tool integrations (Google Classroom, GitHub, LinkedIn, Smartboard, Report Generator) with live status badges and action buttons that simulate connecting or syncing each service.

Provides a smartboard session control panel where faculty can select branch, division, and subject, start/stop a class with optional recording, and toggle topic completion with a live progress tracker.
Shows a filterable student performance table with attendance, assignment, and participation metrics, a mini SVG skill-growth sparkline per student, and an attendance distribution bar chart.
frontend/src/components/tabs/FacultyInte: A multi-section faculty dashboard with a sub-navigation bar that switches between sub-components covering smartboard teaching, topic tracking, student performance, networking, integrations, academic control, and an AI teaching assistant.
frontend/src/components/tabs/institute-c: A sticky bottom panel displaying campus environment and smart governance metrics (e.g., satisfaction scores, sustainability index) with a collapsible layout, circular score meter, and SVG trend line chart.

A faculty performance dashboard showing teaching scores, contribution indices, and feedback ratings for each faculty member, with filtering by department, weak faculty identification, and training recommendations via alert dialogs.

A combined infrastructure and placement control panel displaying missing/partial facilities, lab comparisons, smartboard usage, tech upgrade statuses, company engagement, salary trends, and placement rates by branch.

An analytics dashboard presenting institute-wide KPI cards, branch and division performance scores, teacher rankings, weak student distribution, attendance trends, benchmark comparisons against IITs/NITs, and AI-generated recommendations.

A student growth panel tracking at-risk students with improvement plans, skill gap analysis versus industry benchmarks, certification counts, competitive exam enrollment, mentorship assignments, and placement readiness distribution.
frontend/src/components/tabs/InstituteCo: An institute-level command center dashboard with sub-navigation routing to sections for performance analytics, faculty optimization, student growth, and infrastructure/placement control.
frontend/src/components/tabs/parent-insi: Displays a detailed faculty transparency panel for parents, showing teacher profiles, engagement scores, syllabus completion, feedback ratings, and class division comparisons using custom SVG progress indicators and star ratings.
Renders an institute development report for parents covering infrastructure upgrades, placement statistics with a trend chart, campus metrics, and comparisons against top college benchmarks.
Provides an interactive collapsible panel for parents to schedule virtual meetings with teachers or HOD, submit feedback, and rate their experience with star ratings.
Displays a comprehensive student growth report including subject grades, skill levels, achievements, career readiness metrics, coding activity, and a monthly performance line chart.
frontend/src/components/tabs/ParentInsig: A secure parent-facing portal with sub-navigation for viewing student growth reports, faculty teaching transparency, and institute development reports, with a print/download report button.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SkillBasedT: Renders a skill-based student discovery page where users can filter software/hardware students by skill search, view profile cards with GitHub/LinkedIn links, and browse upcoming hackathons.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SmartNotifi: Displays a student productivity dashboard with live exam countdown timers, assignment tracking, a study goal manager, a monthly calendar, and earned achievement badges.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Sustainable: Implements a peer-to-peer marketplace for students to buy, sell, or rent hardware, software, books, and dev boards, with category filtering and star ratings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed for this prototype since all data is static or mocked.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines extensive CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) for light/dark mode and multiple portal themes (Faculty Hub, Institute Intelligence, Parent Insight).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), oklch-based color tokens for multiple portal themes, custom border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 9) describing SmartCampus Connect as a 9-section SPA with architectural notes, known issues, and a detailed registry of all implemented features across navigation, dashboards, and portal sub-systems.
